name: sso-token-group-selector
title: ProductFlow SSO Token Group Selector - Replace Manual Input with Dropdown
description: Replace the manually-typed TokenGroup string input in the ProductFlow SSO admin configuration page with a single-select dropdown populated from the existing GET /api/group/ endpoint. Eliminates the typo-and-silent-failure class of misconfiguration where admins write a group name that does not exist in the GroupRatio map. Strictly scoped: no backend changes, no preview panel, no orphan-group diagnostics - all rejected during the 2026-05-24 grill-me session in favor of strict job-boundary discipline. Post-r1 review: adds __none__ sentinel for clearing, stable client-side sort, isError state handling, and 4 new zh i18n keys.
creator: name
notes: Scope minimized after grill-me + r1 review. Decision matrix records 14 explicit rulings (9 from grill, 5 from r1 review). Backlog items (orphan-group health check, ProductFlow model selector, preview panel, group-deletion cascade) are documented but explicitly OUT of scope.
